sourceMovie.title: Last Seen Alive
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Last Seen Alive (2022) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Brian Goodman's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Die Hard: With a Vengeance
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Last Seen Alive clicked for you, Die Hard: With a Vengeance (1995) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Last Seen Alive?
faq.answer: Try Die Hard: With a Vengeance, Die Hard 2, Taken 3—each shares DNA with Last Seen Alive while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Last Seen Alive?
faq.answer: Last Seen Alive (2022) is best described as Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Last Seen Alive worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
